name: semiclaw
description: If you prefer to run it secretly, use semiclaw

scripts.build:dist: set -euo pipefail; mkdir -p dist; cd app; VERSION="${VERSION:-$(git describe --tags --exact-match 2>/dev/null || date +%Y%m%d)-$(git rev-parse --short HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo dev)}"; LDFLAGS="-s -w -X main.version=${VERSION}"; GOOS=linux GOARCH=amd64 CGO_ENABLED=0 go build -trimpath -ldflags "$LDFLAGS" -o ../dist/semiclaw-linux-x86_64-${VERSION} ./cmd/semiclaw; GOOS=darwin GOARCH=amd64 CGO_ENABLED=0 go build -trimpath -ldflags "$LDFLAGS" -o ../dist/semiclaw-macos-x86_64-${VERSION} ./cmd/semiclaw; cd ../dist; chmod +x semiclaw-linux-x86_64-${VERSION} semiclaw-macos-x86_64-${VERSION}; for f in semiclaw-linux-x86_64-${VERSION} semiclaw-macos-x86_64-${VERSION}; do tar -czf "$f.tar.gz" "$f"; done; shasum -a 256 semiclaw-linux-x86_64-${VERSION}.tar.gz semiclaw-macos-x86_64-${VERSION}.tar.gz > checksums-${VERSION}.txt
